questiontext.text: In a recurring deposit of \({a}\) per month for \(T\) months, total deposit is:

name.text: Chapter 3 — Unit III — Modules, submodules and modules over PIDs

generalfeedback.text: Both lines have same LHS but different RHS \({c}\ne{d}\): the system is inconsistent (no solution).

questiontext.text: Conceptual (Chapter 3 — Unit III — Modules, submodules and modules over PIDs): which expression equals \( {a}({b}+{c}) \)?

questiontext.text: A sum doubles itself in \(T\) years at simple interest. Rate is:

name.text: Chapter 3 — Unit III — Modules, submodules and modules over PIDs

questiontext.text: Mode of a data set is:

generalfeedback.text: The value with the highest frequency.

questiontext.text: Factor theorem: \((x-{a})\) is a factor of \(p(x)\) iff:

questiontext.text: If a system \(AX=B\) is consistent and \(\det A\ne 0\), the number of solutions is:

generalfeedback.text: Non-singular matrix gives a unique solution.

name.text: Chapter 3 — Unit III — Modules, submodules and modules over PIDs

questiontext.text: For 2x2 system \({a}x+y={c},\ x+{b}y={d}\), Cramer gives \(\Delta\) (coefficient determinant) equal to:
